All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbacusApplication
Application class for initializing global components and repositories.
AdminImageAdapter
Adapter for the admin image moderation list.
AdminImageAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
 
AdminLogsFragment
Admin-only logs screen with two tabs: Images and Profiles.
AdminLogsFragment.AdminTabFragment
 
AdminProfileAdapter
Adapter for the admin profile moderation list.
AdminProfileAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
 
AdminViewModel
ViewModel for admin moderation screens (images + profiles).
CreateEventViewModel
Manages UI state and business logic for the event creation process.
Event
Entity class representing an Event in the system.
EventAdapter
EventAdapter.java Binds a list of Event objects to item_event cards in the home RecyclerView.
EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
 
EventAdapter.OnEventDeleteListener
 
EventDetailsFragment
 
EventQrFragment
 
EventRemoteDataSource
Handles direct Firestore communication for the events collection.
EventRepository
Centralized data access layer for event data.
EventRepository.EventCallback
 
GuestSignUpFragment
 
LoginActivity
Activity for user login for existing users, using Firebase Auth.
LotteryGuidelinesFragment
 
MainActivity
 
MainInboxFragment
Inbox screen — displays notifications for the current user.
MainQrScanFragment
 
MainSavedFragment
 
ManageEventFragment
UI Controller for the active event management screen.
ManageEventViewModel
Manages UI state and business logic for tracking entrants and finalizing the lottery.
Notification
 
NotificationAdapter
 
NotificationFragment
Fragment to display a list of notifications for the entrant.
NotificationRemoteDataSource
 
NotificationRemoteDataSource.OnNotificationsUpdatedListener
 
NotificationRepository
 
OrganizerCreateFragment
UI Controller for the event creation screen.
OrganizerLogsFragment
OrganizerLogsFragment Shows logs of waitlist activity, lottery draws, and notifications sent.
OrganizerManageFragment
UI Controller for the active event management screen.
OrganizerToolsFragment
OrganizerToolsFragment Landing page for organizer/admin tools.
ProfileFragment
ProfileFragment The profile screen UI.
ProfileViewModel
ProfileViewModel Holds all business logic and state for the profile screen.
QRCodeGenerator
 
RegisterActivity
 
RegistrationHistoryFragment
Architecture Layer: View (Fragment) Displays a scrollable list of the current user's past event registrations and their lottery outcomes.
RegistrationHistoryViewModel
Architecture Layer: ViewModel Fetches and holds the current user's registration history from Firestore.
RegistrationHistoryViewModel.Factory
 
RegistrationHistoryViewModel.Registration
Raw data object returned by the repository.
RegistrationHistoryViewModel.RegistrationHistoryItem
Display-ready item consumed by the RecyclerView adapter.
RegistrationHistoryViewModel.RegistrationRepository
 
RegistrationHistoryViewModel.RegistrationRepository.HistoryCallback
 
RegistrationRemoteDataSource
Performs CRUD operations on the waitlist data in remote Firestore database.
RegistrationRepository
Controller class that manages all actions related to the lottery and waitlist.
RegistrationRepository.BooleanCallback
Callback interface for methods returning a boolean.
RegistrationRepository.EntryCallback
Callback interface for methods returning a WaitlistEntry.
RegistrationRepository.IntegerCallback
Callback interface for methods returning an Integer.
RegistrationRepository.VoidCallback
Callback interface for void methods.
RegistrationRepository.WaitlistCallback
Callback interface for methods returning an ArrayList of WaitlistEntry.
SplashActivity
Splash Activity Behaviour: - Entry point for the app, shown before the main screen.
StorageRepository
Centralized data access layer for Firebase Storage media files.
User
 
UserLocalDataSource
Architecture Layer: Local Data Source Stores and retrieves user-related data using SharedPreferences.
UserRemoteDataSource
 
UserRepository
Architecture Layer: Repository Coordinates user initialization and synchronization between local SharedPreferences storage and Firebase Firestore.
UserRepository.StringCallback
 
UserRepository.UserCallback
 
UserRepository.VoidCallback
 
WaitlistAdapter
Adapter for displaying the list of entrants on a waitlist.
WaitlistEntry
Entity class for a waitlist entry.
WaitlistViewFragment
Fragment for organizers to view the waitlist of a specific event.
